name: faces
description: Local face detection and clustering using InsightFace ONNX models

config_schema.label: Model size
config_schema.description: buffalo_l: high accuracy, ~280 MB download. buffalo_s: smaller and faster, ~25 MB.

config_schema.label: Cluster sensitivity
config_schema.description: How similar faces must be to group together. Lower = stricter matching.

config_schema.label: Min faces per cluster
config_schema.description: Minimum number of faces required to form a cluster.
